label: Mid-career data analyst targeting Staff Data Scientist
resume_text:
Jordan Park
jordan.park@example.com | linkedin.com/in/jordan-park-example | github.com/jpark-data-example

SUMMARY
Senior Data Analyst with 6 years of experience leading product analytics, A/B testing infrastructure, and data mentorship at consumer marketplaces. Seeking Staff or Principal Data Scientist role at a Series B+ company focused on pricing, marketplace dynamics, or growth experimentation.

EDUCATION
B.S. Statistics, University of Michigan (2014-2018)
Minor: Computer Science | GPA 3.78

EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Analyst, Stripe (Sep 2021-present)
- Lead analyst for Connect platform; partner with PM and Eng on pricing experiments and platform monetization
- Designed A/B test framework adopted across 4 product teams; ~$2M attributed lift quarterly per internal causal-inference review
- Reduced query latency on the merchant-insights dashboard from 14s p95 to 5s p95 via materialized views and dbt restructuring
- Mentor 3 junior analysts; led weekly office hours that became the team's onboarding standard
- Built bayesian sequential testing framework after the team got bit by 4 false positives from frequentist t-tests

Data Analyst, DoorDash (Jun 2019-Aug 2021)
- Built dasher-supply forecasting model that became the basis for surge pricing in 12 markets
- Owned weekly business review SQL + Python pipeline feeding executive dashboard
- Collaborated with research scientists on pricing elasticity studies

Data Analyst, Capital One (Jul 2018-May 2019)
- Credit risk modeling team; built propensity models for prime card upgrades
- Cleared SR 11-7 model validation review on first submission

PROJECTS
pricing-experiments-cookbook (private GitHub repo, shared with team) - Internal documentation site for pricing experiment design patterns at Stripe.

SKILLS
SQL (advanced, including window functions and recursive CTEs), Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, scipy.stats), dbt, Looker, Mode, Snowflake, basic causal inference (CausalImpact, DoubleML), A/B testing infrastructure

OTHER
Member, ASA (American Statistical Association); occasional speaker at Seattle Data Council meetups; mentor in Lean In Tech program for women in data
